## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Matthew Panzarino (GrowthX.ai) and Branko Kral (chosendata.com) to discuss their backgrounds, roles, and initial thoughts on joining GrowthX.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Both Matthew and Branko bring extensive experience in content, marketing, and team leadership to GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [The company's focus on merging content and product development is a key attraction for both](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Hiring and team building will be a significant challenge and priority for the director layer](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [There's excitement about contributing to workflow development and improving content processes](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)

## Topics

### Matthew's Background

  - [Recently VP of Marketing at FinTech startup Tip Top (10 people)](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [10 years running TechCrunch editorial operations](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
      - [Managed 100-person global team](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
      - [Ran Disrupt events, Startup Battlefield competition](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [Evaluated startups similar to VC process without taking equity](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Battlefield alumni raised $8B+, 350+ exits](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)

### Branko's Experience

  - [Started in e-commerce and marketing during university](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [Built agency specializing in SEO, content, analytics for tech/health companies](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [Recently sold agency assets to GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [Expertise in team building: grew team from 0 to 25 in 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
  - [Strong background in workflow and process development](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)

### GrowthX.ai Appeal

  - [Opportunity to work on potentially impactful language model applications](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Thin "membrane" between engineering and content teams](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [Chance to influence product development while working on content](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [Highly qualified team members across the organization](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### Workflow and Process Development

  - [Both excited to contribute to refining content workflows](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
  - [Goal: Create system to log and analyze all content edits/interactions](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Desire to institutionalize learnings from content development process](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

### Hiring and Team Building

  - [Identified as a key challenge for director-level employees](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [Need to add significantly to ME (Managing Editor) and CM (Content Manager) layers](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
  - [Both have experience and networks to draw from for recruitment](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Branko to finish current course project before starting at GrowthX on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
  - [Bridget to handle onboarding process for Branko](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Matthew and Bridget working on improving onboarding structure over next couple months](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Branko to review existing documentation and reach out with any questions](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
  - [Further discussions on workflow development and team building to follow](https://fathom.video/share/FRcbNhXEV2zp7tFASqoqvXRQ6s1Rb-1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)
